skipped_reason: Live JV-10 runtime smoke is blocked because this host has no TUI_TRANSLATOR_ONNXRUNTIME_DLL and no installed local MT model cache. This artifact records the runtime decision surface only.

notes: Current repo path compiles behind local-mt but uses full-sequence greedy decode without KV-cache.
No live translation smoke was run because ONNX Runtime DLL and model cache are absent.
Recommended JV-11 target after adding decoder_with_past_model.onnx and tensor-name discovery.
Requires p95 latency, RTF, RSS, CPU, and error-rate evidence before default eligibility.
CTranslate2 is viable as a conditional fallback but adds new Windows DLL and license packaging obligations.
Do not add CT2 to production unless ORT KV-cache misses performance or packaging gates.

comparison.notes: No runtime benchmark executed. ORT KV-cache is selected as the next implementation path because ORT is already the repo runtime surface; CT2 remains a fallback pending separate Windows packaging smoke.
